entries.source: "What should I be careful not to romanticize?"
entries.value: "Cad ba chóir dom a bheith cúramach gan rómánsú a dhéanamh air?"

entries.source: "What were your real options at this moment?"
entries.value: "Cad iad na roghanna fíora a bhí agat ag an nóiméad seo?"

entries.source: "What would people in your time assume that modern readers might miss?"
entries.value: "Cad a ghlacfadh daoine i do chuid ama leis nach dtuigfeadh léitheoirí nua-aimseartha?"

entries.source: "What would your critics say about your choices?"
entries.value: "Cad a déarfadh do léirmheastóirí faoi do roghanna?"

entries.source: "Which parts of your story are well documented?"
entries.value: "Cé na codanna de do scéal atá dea-dhoiciméadaithe?"

entries.source: a critic;
entries.value: léirmheastóir;

entries.source: a modern historian;
entries.value: staraí nua-aimseartha;

entries.source: a primary source excerpt to evaluate.
entries.value: sliocht príomhfhoinse le measúnú.

entries.source: a rival;
entries.value: iomaitheoir;

entries.source: A useful historical AI response should have two layers.
entries.value: Ba chóir dhá shraith a bheith ag freagra stairiúil úsáideach ó IS.

entries.source: AI historical conversation can help when it is handled carefully.
entries.value: Is féidir le comhrá stairiúil IS cabhrú nuair a láimhseáiltear go cúramach é.

entries.source: AI roleplay
entries.value: Rólghlacadh IS

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
entries.value: gnáthdhuine a bhfuil tionchar ag an gcinneadh air;

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS éiginnteacht a lipéadú.

entries.source: Character voice plus evidence notes
entries.value: Guth carachtair móide nótaí fianaise

entries.source: Continue the route
entries.value: Lean leis an mbealach

entries.source: Dates and summaries matter, but learners often need a way into the human situation: what people believed, what choices they saw, what limits shaped them, and what they could not have known.
entries.value: Tá dátaí agus achoimrí tábhachtach, ach is minic a bhíonn bealach isteach sa staid dhaonna de dhíth ar fhoghlaimeoirí: cad a chreid daoine, cad iad na roghanna a chonaic siad, cad iad na teorainneacha a mhúnlaigh iad, agus cad nach bhféadfadh siad a bheith ar eolas acu.

entries.source: For example, a learner studying democracy might talk with Ambedkar, then ask Source Critic to evaluate a speech or constitutional passage. A learner studying a city can start with Geography Explorer to understand place, then move into historical conversation.
entries.value: Mar shampla, d’fhéadfadh foghlaimeoir atá ag staidéar daonlathais labhairt le Ambedkar, ansin iarraidh ar Source Critic óráid nó sliocht bunreachtúil a mheas. Is féidir le foghlaimeoir atá ag staidéar cathrach tosú le Geography Explorer chun áit a thuiscint, ansin bogadh isteach i gcomhrá stairiúil.

entries.source: Good guardrails for students
entries.value: Teorainneacha maithe do dhaltaí

entries.source: Historical roleplay can make context, choices, and ideas easier to remember when it separates imagination from evidence.
entries.value: Is féidir le rólghlacadh stairiúil comhthéacs, roghanna, agus smaointe a dhéanamh níos éasca le cuimhneamh nuair a scarann sé samhlaíocht ó fhianaise.

entries.source: Historical roleplay is especially powerful when learners compare perspectives. After speaking with one figure, ask for another point of view:
entries.value: Bíonn rólghlacadh stairiúil thar a bheith cumhachtach nuair a chuireann foghlaimeoirí peirspictíochtaí i gcomparáid. Tar éis labhairt le figiúr amháin, iarr dearcadh eile:

entries.source: History becomes more memorable without pretending uncertainty has disappeared.
entries.value: Éiríonn stair níos cuimhneacha gan ligean air go bhfuil éiginnteacht imithe.

entries.source: History is easier to remember when it feels inhabited.
entries.value: Tá stair níos éasca le cuimhneamh nuair a mhothaíonn sí go bhfuil cónaí inti.

entries.source: Learning history by talking to historical figures with AI
entries.value: Stair a fhoghlaim trí labhairt le figiúirí stairiúla le IS

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Scar maímh i gcarachtar ó nótaí fianaise.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Tosaigh le Talk to a Historical Person le haghaidh comhrá faoi stiúir figiúir. Úsáid Time Travel le haghaidh turas áit-agus-tréimhse. Léigh treoir Talk to a Historical Person nó prasaí agus lúb staidéir Time Travel más mian leat sreabhadh oibre níos struchtúrtha.

entries.source: Talking to a historical figure is not magic access to the past. It is a learning format.
entries.value: Ní rochtain draíochta ar an am atá caite é labhairt le figiúr stairiúil. Is formáid foghlama é.

entries.source: That combination is more useful than either layer alone. A plain encyclopedia summary can be forgettable. Pure roleplay can be misleading. Voice plus evidence creates a better learning surface.
entries.value: Tá an teaglaim sin níos úsáidí ná ceachtar sraith ina haonar. Is féidir le hachoimre shimplí chiclipéid a bheith dearmadach. Is féidir le rólghlacadh íon a bheith míthreorach. Cruthaíonn guth móide fianaise dromchla foghlama níos fearr.

entries.source: That is how inspir approaches historical conversation: a persona card, an in-character reply, and context notes that keep imagination connected to evidence.
entries.value: Sin é mar a théann inspir i ngleic le comhrá stairiúil: cárta pearsana, freagra i gcarachtar, agus nótaí comhthéacs a choinníonn samhlaíocht ceangailte le fianaise.

entries.source: That kind of questioning turns history from a list into a context.
entries.value: Tiontaíonn an cineál ceistiúcháin sin stair ó liosta ina comhthéacs.

entries.source: The AI should separate character from evidence. It can answer in a historically grounded voice, but it should also add notes when records are incomplete, interpretations differ, or the response is a reconstruction.
entries.value: Ba chóir don IS carachtar a scaradh ó fhianaise. Is féidir leis freagairt i nguth atá bunaithe go stairiúil, ach ba chóir dó nótaí a chur leis freisin nuair atá taifid neamhiomlán, nuair a bhíonn léirmhínithe éagsúil, nó nuair is atógáil é an freagra.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Is é an chéad sraith an rólghlacadh. Is féidir léi labhairt i nguth inrochtana, cúiseanna a mhíniú, agus an cás a dhéanamh beoga. Seo an chuid a chabhraíonn leis an gcuimhne.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Oibríonn an fhormáid toisc go ligeann sí d’fhoghlaimeoirí ceisteanna mar seo a chur:

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Ní hé an sprioc an IS a dhéanamh ina údarás. Is é an sprioc foghlaimeoirí a chur ag cur ceisteanna stairiúla níos fearr.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Ní hé an gealltanas gur féidir le IS an t-am atá caite a ghairm. Ní féidir. Is é an gealltanas gur féidir le rólghlacadh comhthéacs a dhéanamh níos éasca le ceistiú, comparáid, agus cuimhneamh nuair a scartar an taithí go soiléir ó fhianaise.

entries.source: The safety rule
entries.value: An riail sábháilteachta

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Is é an dara sraith an nóta fianaise. Ba chóir dó a rá cathain atá rud doiciméadaithe go díreach, léirmhínithe go forleathan, faoi dhíospóid, nó atógtha don fhoghlaim. Seo an chuid a chosnaíonn cruinneas.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Ní ceisteanna tráth ceiste iad na ceisteanna is láidre. Is ceisteanna comhthéacs iad.

entries.source: The useful part of historical roleplay
entries.value: An chuid úsáideach de rólghlacadh stairiúil

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.
entries.value: Cabhraíonn na ceisteanna seo leis an bhfoghlaimeoir stair a fheiceáil mar shraith brú agus léirmhínithe seachas dráma feistis. Coinníonn siad an IS macánta freisin. Dá mhéad a iarrann an foghlaimeoir faoi fhianaise, teorainneacha, agus peirspictíocht, is lú seans go n-éireoidh an seisiún ina fhantaisíocht ag caitheamh ainm cáiliúil.

entries.source: Try prompts like:
entries.value: Bain triail as prasaí mar:

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Úsáid rólghlacadh stairiúil IS le trí riail:

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Úsáid é le haghaidh comparáide

entries.source: Verify important facts with trusted sources, textbooks, or teacher-provided materials.
entries.value: Fíoraigh fíricí tábhachtacha le foinsí iontaofa, téacsleabhair, nó ábhair a sholáthraíonn múinteoir.

entries.source: What choices were available?
entries.value: Cad iad na roghanna a bhí ar fáil?

entries.source: What did their society assume?
entries.value: Cad a ghlac a sochaí leis mar thoimhde?

entries.source: What did this person care about?
entries.value: Cad a bhí tábhachtach don duine seo?

entries.source: What to ask a historical figure
entries.value: Cad ba cheart a iarraidh ar dhuine stairiúil

entries.source: What would modern readers misunderstand?
entries.value: Cad a mhíthuiscfeadh léitheoirí nua-aimseartha?

entries.source: Which parts are well documented and which parts are uncertain?
entries.value: Cé na codanna atá doiciméadaithe go maith agus cé na codanna atá éiginnte?

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Is féidir leat triail a bhaint as an bhformáid in Talk to a Historical Person. Más mian leat an radharc níos leithne sula mbuaileann tú le duine, úsáid Time Travel chun cuairt a thabhairt ar thréimhse, srianta a iniúchadh, agus ansin fiafraí cad iad na roghanna a bhí ag daoine i ndáiríre.
